title: Transponder Snails
description: Transponder Snails from One Piece, in Minecraft (via Simple Voice Chat)
body:
# _puru puru puru..._ Gatcha!

## Find Den Den Mushi across your world

![Find Den Den Mushi across your world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/837900a0b66d488e2f36bd5f1c6dff8198e7cda9_0.webp)

## Craft them into Transponder Snails
## 
![Craft them into Transponder Snails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c8eccab798ea837a1c366770c2437abe4bd7dc5_0.webp)

## Customize your Snail

![Snails Underwater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caef654e555167ecf53ba8adf3188cf76d1d80dd_0.webp)

## Call your friends

![Dialing GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af3cae4569720595a4916970409eccb526378980_0.webp)

### _(Compatible with Forge 47.3.X and later & Simple Voice Chat 2.5.X and later)_
